message:
feat(ftui): implement QueryCleared, QueryWordDeleted, and HashModeAccepted message handlers

Wire up three CassMsg variants that were previously declared but had no
match arms in the Model::update() implementation:

- QueryCleared (Ctrl+U): clears the entire query string and marks state
  dirty for debounced persistence
- QueryWordDeleted (Ctrl+W): deletes the last word from the query by
  trimming trailing whitespace then truncating to the last whitespace
  boundary; handles single-word case by clearing entirely
- HashModeAccepted: user chose the hash-based embedder fallback instead
  of downloading the ML model; dismisses the consent dialog

These complete the keyboard editing shortcuts defined in the keymap RFC
and the consent dialog flow for offline/hash-only semantic search.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
